prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: NPT-TFBSK-3X3X1-SLVR Product Type: KNIFE Brand (from catalog): ASR Tactical Existing Title: 13.5" Black Tactical Fixed Blade Survival Knife with Glass Breaker and Saw Description: This 13.5" survival knife features crucial improvements you won't find on the average fixed blade.

The blade itself is 6.75" long and has a saw tooth reverse edge for camping and wilderness survival tasks. Cutting through wood, brush, cord and other material is essential when building fires, shelters, snares and improvised tools.

For roadside emergencies, the base of the handle features a steel glass breaker. This metal spike is also great for self defense and shattering dangerous ice buildup on vehicles, structures and pathways.

We recommend you keep this knife in a small bag with some other emergency supplies. Leave it in your car, truck, or home for those last minute evacuations and unfortunate surprises. Search Terms: sheath camping emergency wilderness self defense saw blade glass breaker fixed survival tactical Features: - 6.75" Hardened Steel Blade - Saw Tooth Reverse Edge - Glass Breaker Handle - Nylon Sheath - 13.5" Overall Length === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Tactical 13" Black Tactical Fixed Blade Survival Knife

openai.item_name: ASR Tactical 13.5-in Black Tactical Survival Knife

anthropic.title_differentiation: 675" Hardened Steel Blade, Saw Tooth Reverse Edge, Glass Breaker, Nylon Sheath

openai.title_differentiation: 675" Hardened Steel Blade, Saw Tooth Reverse Edge, Glass Breaker Handle, Nylon Sheath, Roadside Emergency Use
